name: @tootallnate/wem
description: Parser + decoder for Audiokinetic Wwise Encoded Media (.wem) files. Identifies the codec (PCM, Vorbis, Switch-Opus, etc) from the RIFF/WAVE/fmt chunk and converts playable codecs (PCM, Switch-Opus) to browser-friendly formats (WAV, Ogg-Opus).
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
